aids.title: Traversal Orders
aids.content:
**In**order: Node is **In** the middle (L-N-R)
**Pre**order: Node **Pre**cedes children (N-L-R)
**Post**order: Node is **Post**poned after children (L-R-N)

aids.title: DFS = Stack, BFS = Queue
aids.content:
DFS (Deep): uses Stack (LIFO) - Inorder, Preorder, Postorder
BFS (Broad): uses Queue (FIFO) - Level Order

Recursion implicitly uses the call stack for DFS!

aids.title: Traversal Applications
aids.content:
Inorder: sorted output from BST
Preorder: copy/clone tree, prefix expression
Postorder: delete tree, postfix expression, calculate directory size
Level order: print tree level by level, find shortest path

aids.title: Tree Reconstruction Rule
aids.content:
Need 2 sequences, one MUST be Inorder:
- Preorder + Inorder = unique tree
- Postorder + Inorder = unique tree
- Preorder + Postorder = NOT unique

Inorder splits left and right subtrees!
aids.forRemembering: Rules for reconstructing a binary tree from traversals
